channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Bluesky Has a New App, and It’s All About AI
item.description: Jay Graber is not CEO anymore, but that doesn't mean she hasn't been busy.

item.title: 'A high-speed digital cheat sheet': Google unveils TurboQuant AI-compression algorithm, which it claims can hugely reduce LLM memory usage
item.description: Google introduces TurboQuant, a compression method that reduces memory usage and increases speed, though results depend on benchmarks and real-world implementation variability.

item.title: Bethesda is shutting down The Elder Scrolls: Blades on June 30
item.description: It's a sad day for the dozens of players still grinding The Elder Scrolls: Blades. Bethesda announced that it's permanently shutting down the servers for its free-to-play mobile spinoff on June 30. First spotted on Reddit, The Elder Scrolls: Blades has already been delisted from the App Store and Google Play store, and is currently unavailable on the Nintendo Store. In the meantime, players will receive a free bundle of Gems and Sigils, while all items in the in-game store are available for just one Gem or Sigil each. With a server shutdown imminent, The Elder Scrolls: Blades' will at least cr...

item.title: Dammit, Jim, He’s a Doctor *And* an Action Figure!
item.description: The 60th anniversary celebration of 'Star Trek' continues with a new figure for everyone's favorite surly medical officer.

item.title: Sony headphones and earbuds are majorly marked down during Amazons Big Spring sale
item.description: During Amazon's Big Spring Sale, shop major savings on Sony headphones. Get Sony XM6 headphones for their lowest price ever. Plus, find tons of savings across the brand's earbuds and headphones.

item.title: Cela va être historique : Christina Koch va faire ce qu’aucune femme n’a encore jamais fait dans l’espace
item.description: Longtemps absentes des grandes missions spatiales, les femmes s’imposent aujourd’hui progressivement dans l’exploration habitée. Avec la mission Artemis II, la Nasa franchit un cap symbolique et historique. À bord du vaisseau Orion, l’astronaute américaine Christina Koch incarne cette nouvelle...

item.title: Soundcore deals rock during Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: Soundcore earbuds, headphones, speakers, and projectors are up to 42% off during the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: I tried the Nintendo Switch 2’s new handheld boost feature, and I couldn’t believe how good these smash-hit Switch games looked
item.description: I tested the Nintendo Switch 2’s handheld boost mode, and it’s an absolute game-changer — here’s why.

item.title: J’ai testé le Ninja Crispi : l’air fryer modulaire en verre qui change vraiment la donne ?
item.description: Encore un air fryer de plus ? C’est ce que je me suis dit en découvrant le Ninja Crispi. Mais après plusieurs semaines à l’utiliser au quotidien, son concept en verre, aussi original que pratique, a su me convaincre… malgré quelques compromis.

item.title: Ce pack Arlo avec 2 caméras 2K et une Floodlight 2K avec projecteurs chute sous les 250 €
item.description: Si vous souhaitez sécuriser efficacement votre domicile, le pack Arlo contenant deux caméras Essential 3 2K et une Floodlight, laquelle intègre deux projecteurs, pourrait bien vous convenir. Actuellement, Boulanger le propose en plus à 239,99 euros au lieu de 399,99 euros.

item.title: The Avatar fighting game will release on July 2 for PC and consoles
item.description:
The fighting game community is going to have their hands full this summer between the release of Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls and Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game. The studio behind the 2D fighting game based in the Avatar universe announced that a July 2 release date with a trailer that shows off new gameplay and a base price of $29.99.
The game will launch with 12 characters, encompassing both the heroes and villains from Avatar: The Last Airbender and The Legend of Korra. The game's developer, Gameplay Group International, said that there are more than 900 hand-drawn frames for each chara...

item.title: Amazons Spring Sale is surprisingly good this year: We found 100+ deals on Apple, Kindle, Bose, and Ninja
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale runs until March 31. Take $100 off Apple Watch Series 11, 60% off Shark robot vacuums, and Kindles for $95.
